changes.description: Party Plan now separates owner and friend member roles.
changes.details: Group ownership is tracked by owner_discord_id and member type owner/friend instead of relying on a generic self marker, so friend uploads no longer override the owner's local roster identity.

changes.description: Party Plan now stores shared rosters per Discord ID.
changes.details: Shared character data is written to per-member Discord ID sheets and character inclusion is tracked by included_group_ids, allowing the same character data to be reused across multiple groups without duplicating character rows.

changes.description: Party Plan group modes were added.
changes.details: Groups can now run in Non-Static mode for weekly availability tracking or Static mode for preserving assigned characters as planned static raid runs.

changes.description: Static reservations now protect assigned characters across groups.
changes.details: When a character is assigned to a raid in a Static group, that character is reserved for that static run and cannot be assigned to the same raid from another group. Reserved characters stay visible but are greyed out with a tooltip naming the static group and raid.

changes.description: Party Plan now detects cross-group clears.
changes.details: If a member clears a raid with another saved or sheet-backed group, other groups can show whether the clear happened with members from that group or with a named Static group.

changes.description: Party Plan encounter snapshots now store gate information.
changes.details: Encounter snapshot rows include a gate field so raid completion can be matched against the expected gates instead of marking a whole raid complete after only one gate.

changes.description: Party Plan now shows pending raid clears.
changes.details: Characters that cleared only part of a multi-gate raid now show a pending state until all expected gates for that raid and difficulty are complete.

changes.description: Party Plan now shows last updated information.
changes.details: Active groups display their last updated timestamp so members can see when the local or remote Party Plan data was last refreshed.

changes.description: Party Plan remote sync now checks status before loading full group data.
changes.details: The sheet backend exposes a lightweight status action, and the app only performs a full remote load when the group's updated_at value changes.

changes.description: Party Plan upload now saves locally first.
changes.details: The Upload/Update flow now combines local saving and remote syncing, preventing remote upload errors caused by unsaved local changes.

changes.description: Party Plan remote errors are logged more clearly.
changes.details: Remote sync failures, invalid endpoint responses, parse errors, and Apps Script redirects are now reported through the local log path with truncated response bodies for easier debugging.

changes.description: Party Plan handles Google Apps Script redirects more reliably.
changes.details: The Tauri sync handler now follows Apps Script redirects manually and keeps POST requests intact for redirect types that require it, reducing 405 and HTML response failures.

changes.description: Party Plan raid board run counts now show open group runs.
changes.details: The number badge on each raid lane now represents remaining possible group runs based on available assigned characters per member and raid capacity, including Serca and Behemoth capacity exceptions.

changes.description: Party Plan UI was tightened again for active group use.
changes.details: The active group toolbar, invite link area, tab buttons, delete button, raid lane spacing, assignment count badge, and runner lists were made more compact.

changes.description: Party Plan invite links are now owner-focused.
changes.details: The invite link input and copy controls are only shown to the group owner, while non-invited users get a friendly message telling them which owner to ask for an invite.

changes.description: Party Plan group controls are now owner-only.
changes.details: Only the group owner can add or remove friends, change group mode, configure planned raids, manage raid assignments, upload group-controlled changes, or delete the group.

changes.description: Party Plan friend members now control only their own roster selection.
changes.details: Friends can choose which of their own characters are included in the group and upload or update those roster choices without changing owner-controlled group settings.

changes.description: Party Plan invite flow now requires owner-added members.
changes.details: Joining a group from an invite link now checks whether the local Discord ID is already listed as a group member. Users who were not added by the owner are blocked from joining.

changes.description: Party Plan no longer uses raid config snapshots.
changes.details: The RaidConfigSnapshots table and related plan data were removed from the Apps Script and app sync model because Party Plan no longer needs that snapshot data.

changes.description: Party Plan raid board no longer shows planned-to-run text per character.
changes.details: Raid lane character notes now focus on eligibility and clear state instead of repeating planned-to-run information that is already implied by iLvl and assignments.

changes.description: Party Plan owner detection now works after sync and reload.
changes.details: Owner permissions now resolve from owner_discord_id and normalized member roles, fixing cases where the UI displayed Owner but still blocked group configuration.

changes.description: Party Plan remote group merges preserve member-owned data.
changes.details: Remote saves now merge by the saving member's Discord ID so one member's upload does not wipe another member's characters, completions, encounters, or group-controlled owner fields.

changes.description: Party Plan already-assigned static reservations are removed from old raid frames.
changes.details: If a character becomes reserved by a Static group after already being assigned elsewhere, the stale assignment is hidden from that raid frame and is not written back on the next save.

changes.description: Party Plan completion state now waits for all expected gates.
changes.details: Characters are no longer marked as fully cleared for a raid after only one gate. Completion and encounter snapshots are grouped by raid, difficulty, reset cycle, and expected gate set.

changes.description: Party Plan together-clear detection no longer treats solo owner data as a group clear.
changes.details: A raid is only labeled as cleared together when the encounter includes the required group members that have characters in the current plan.

changes.description: Party Plan delete controls are restricted to owners.
changes.details: The Delete button is only visible for the group owner and is styled as a compact red destructive action.

changes.description: Party Plan Apps Script GET requests now return JSON.
changes.details: The Apps Script template includes a doGet handler so accidental browser visits or GET redirects return a structured JSON response instead of a missing doGet HTML error page.

changes.description: Guardian clears from encounter sync now update the To Do tab.
changes.details: Encounter-synced guardian completions now resolve against the current daily reset in the To Do matrix, and the To Do tab refreshes when encounter sync marks a task completed.
